title: WHO MAY CREATE A MINERAL ROYALTY
doc_html:
PART 2.  WHO MAY CREATE A MINERAL ROYALTY

§82.  Who may create mineral royalty

A mineral royalty may be created either by a landowner who owns mineral rights or by the owner of a mineral servitude.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §82, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
